title: Create Utilities (Unofficial Port)
body:
**вҡҷпёҸ Create Utilities (Unofficial Port)**
рҹ”§ About this Mod

Create Utilities (Unofficial Port) brings the original Create Utilities addon to Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge).

This mod adds a collection of ender-like utility blocks designed to simplify automation, storage, and transportation in your Create setups.

вңЁ Features

This addon introduces powerful utility blocks such as:

рҹҢҖ Void Motor
Transfer rotational power across distances instantly
рҹ“Ұ Void Chest
Access shared storage from anywhere
рҹ§Ә Void Tank
Transport fluids without pipes or long setups
вҡҷпёҸ Gearcube
Distribute rotation in multiple directions

These utilities allow you to build cleaner, more compact, and more efficient Create contraptions.

рҹҡҖ Why use this mod?
Reduce complex pipe and shaft systems
Improve performance with simpler setups
Make automation more flexible
Perfect for large Create factories
рҹ§© Requirements
рҹҸ—пёҸ Create mod (required)
рҹ§ұ NeoForge 1.21.1
рҹ”Ғ About this Port

This is an unofficial community port maintained by SmartStreamLabs.
It updates the original mod to work on newer Minecraft versions.









**вҡҷпёҸ Create Utilities (Unofficial Port)**
About This Port

This port updates Create Utilities to work with modern Minecraft versions (1.21.1).
This is a community-maintained port and is not officially affiliated with the original developer.

Link to the original mod: [Create Utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createutilities)

вҡ пёҸ Disclaimer

**вҡ пёҸ This is an unofficial community port of Create Utilities.**

**All credit for the original mod design, assets, and code goes to the original author (duquee___) and artist BlueIsADude.**

This port exists to make the mod available for newer Minecraft versions while we await an official update.

This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original author.
